articles.title: Big Pharma's War on Turmeric: Why Natural Anti-Inflammatories Threaten the Disease Industry
articles.summary: Turmeric's curcuminoids target multiple disease pathways more effectively than synthetic drugs, but the medical-pharmaceutical complex actively suppresses this research because natural compounds can't be patented for massive profits. articles.title: The Hemp Conspiracy: How DuPont and the Feds Killed America's Medicine Cabinet
articles.summary: Hemp was criminalized in 1937 not for health reasons, but because DuPont saw it as competition to synthetic fibers. The 1970 Controlled Substances Act fraudulently classified hemp as Schedule I with 'no medical use' — a lie that persists today to protect pharmaceutical monopolies.
